Class UserService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api.UserService
Direct Known Subclasses:
JdbcUserService, MockUserService
public abstract class UserService extends Object
Abstract base service for user authentication and management.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public boolean register(String email, String username, String password, String confirmPassword)
      Registers a new user.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      username - username
      password - password
      confirmPassword - password confirmation
      Returns:
      true if registration succeeded

    • registerUser

      public abstract UserService.RegistrationStatus registerUser(String email, String username, String password, String confirmPassword)
      Registers a new user with detailed status.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      username - username
      password - password
      confirmPassword - password confirmation
      Returns:
      registration status

    • login

      public boolean login(String email, String password)
      Logs in a user.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      password - password
      Returns:
      true if authentication succeeded

    • authenticate

      public abstract UserService.LoginStatus authenticate(String email, String password)
      Authenticates a user with detailed status.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      password - password
      Returns:
      authentication status

    • getCurrentUserEmail

      public abstract String getCurrentUserEmail()
      Gets the current user's email.
      Returns:
      current user email or null

    • getCurrentUserRole

      public String getCurrentUserRole()
      Gets the current user's role.
      Returns:
      current user role or "Guest"

    • getCurrentUserRoleInternal

      protected abstract String getCurrentUserRoleInternal()
      Gets the current user's role (internal).
      Returns:
      current user role or null

    • isOwner

      public boolean isOwner()
      Checks if the current user is an owner.
      Returns:
      true if owner

    • canManageSystem

      public boolean canManageSystem()
      Checks if the current user can manage the system.
      Returns:
      true if can manage

    • getCurrentUser

      public abstract User getCurrentUser()
      Gets the current user object.
      Returns:
      current user or null

    • getUsers

      public abstract javafx.collections.ObservableList<User> getUsers()
      Gets all users.
      Returns:
      observable list of users

    • hasActiveSession

      public abstract boolean hasActiveSession()
      Checks if an active session exists.
      Returns:
      true if session active

    • getRemainingThrottleSeconds

      public abstract long getRemainingThrottleSeconds(String email)
      Gets remaining login throttle time.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      Returns:
      remaining throttle seconds

    • inviteUser

      public abstract boolean inviteUser(String email, String role)
      Invites a user.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      role - user role
      Returns:
      true if invitation sent

    • revokeUser

      public abstract boolean revokeUser(String email)
      Revokes user access.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      Returns:
      true if revoked

    • restoreUser

      public abstract boolean restoreUser(String email)
      Restores user access.
      Parameters:
      email - email address
      Returns:
      true if restored

    • logout

      public abstract void logout()
      Logs out the current user.
